narrative:
Logan County has 31,231 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.6% of registrants.
